## 🦅 Secretary Bird PR Checklist

<!-- Thanks for contributing to Agenticana! Fill this out to help us review faster. -->

## Summary
<!-- One sentence: what does this PR do? -->


## Type of Change
- [ ] 🤖 New agent (`agents/{name}.yaml` + `agents/{name}.md`)
- [ ] 🧩 New skill (`skills/{name}/SKILL.md`)
- [ ] 🚀 New phase / script (`scripts/{name}.py`)
- [ ] 🧠 ReasoningBank decisions (new entries in `decisions.json`)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] 📚 Documentation only
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔧 CI / tooling

## What Changed and Why
<!-- Tell us the reasoning — not just what, but WHY this is the right approach -->

-
